news.t: Corgi announces Nasdaq listing of Corgi’s Founder-Led ETF
Corgi, an AI Startup, Lists FDRS on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: FDRS is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.19%, Tesla at 9.35%, Meta Platforms at 8.58%, Oracle at 5.79%, and Palantir Technologies at 5.55%.

overview.description: The Founder-Led ETF (FDRS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Founder Led index. The fund is passively managed to track an index of the top 50 largest, publicly traded US companies where at least one original founder serves in the C-suite or equivalent role. Companies are weighted by market-cap in the underlying portfolio. FDRS was launched on Dec 29, 2025 and is issued by Founder.
